steps.t: Anlaf the Forlorn is in The Forsaken Inn in the Lone-lands. You should collect fake Stars of Old Cider, actually Forsaken Cider, from Anlaf the Forlor…
Foxglove Grubb is in Brockenborings in the Shire, waiting for you to deliver the Stars of Old Cider. You should bring the fake Stars of Old Cider, act…
